name: Yuki Shelving Unit
subtitle: Solid Ash, Open Frame
description: Yuki (雪, 'snow') is an open shelving system with the unhurried proportions of Japanese tansu craft. Four shelves at generous intervals allow objects to breathe — books beside ceramics beside nothing at all. The solid ash frame is jointed without visible hardware, held together by the precision of the fit itself.
care: Dust with a dry cloth. Clean with a lightly damp cloth if needed. Avoid placing objects that may leave moisture marks directly on shelves.
shipping: Flat-pack delivery. All hardware included. Assembly approximately 30 minutes with two people.
metaDescription: Yuki Shelving Unit — solid ash open frame, 4 shelves, no visible hardware. Crafted in Lithuania. From $890 — BeautyHome by NODO Studio.
altText: Yuki open shelving unit in white ash with four generous shelves, styled with ceramics and books
